mapper.sql: n.id, n.title, n.content, n.publisher_id, u.real_name as publisher_name, n.type, n.status, n.publish_time, n.create_time, n.update_time, n.is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM notice n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON n.publisher_id = u.id WHERE n.id = #{id} AND n.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice ( title, content, publisher_id, type, status, publish_time, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{publisherId}, #{type}, #{status}, #{publishTime}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE notice
title = #{title}, content = #{content}, type = #{type}, status = #{status}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE notice SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
